Off Calendar Feb-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: C. Salceda.
James Kraus, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Anna Amundsen, Gail Dawnson and Floy Dawnson, all present, were sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Proposed Judgment from the previous hearing submitted, and the Court taken the matter under submission.

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2007 Set For Case Management Conference On Apr-13-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-04-2007 Continued To Feb-15-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Karla Ellis-Davis.
Andrew M. Zacks, Esq. for Plaintiff: Anna Amundsen, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court orders the matter continued to Feb. 15, 2007 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 218. Plaintiff's Counsel to file a Brief no later than Feb. 9, 2007.
